meaning: n.(尤指军队等之)举手礼,升降旗致敬,呜礼炮等,敬礼v.行礼致敬,敬礼
examples: He raised his hat as a friendly salute.
They all raised their glasses in salute.
It produces Chivas Regal, Ballantine's Beefeater Gin, The Glenlivet, Royal Salute, Aberlour, Scapa, and 100 Pipers.
We were required to salute, among others, any faculty member we encountered on the street.
